methods.description: The process of conducting 40 Ar/39 Ar dating on acid-leached samples from basaltic dikes to determine their age.

steps.description: Neutron irradiation and Ar isotope measurements were conducted at the Kyoto University Reactor (KUR) and Geological Survey of Japan, National Institute of Advanced Industrial Sciences and Technology (AIST).
steps.searchable_summary: conduct neutron irradiation and Ar isotope measurements

methods.description: Measurement of major and selected trace elements in basaltic samples using XRF and ICP-MS techniques.

steps.description: Major and selected trace elements for ten less-altered samples from two basaltic dikes and massive basalt were measured using a Rigaku ZSX Primus II X-ray fluorescence (XRF) spectrometer at the National Museum of Nature and Science (NMNS).
steps.searchable_summary: measure major and trace elements using XRF

steps.description: After XRF analysis, the concentration of a larger range of trace elements was measured using a quadrupole Agilent 7700 × inductively coupled plasma-source mass spectrometry (ICP-MS) instrument at the NMNS.

methods.description: Conducting paleomagnetic measurements to determine the characteristic remanent magnetization (ChRM) of basaltic specimens.

steps.description: Paleomagnetic measurements were conducted at the GSJ-Lab. at AIST, using a superconducting rock magnetometer (2G Enterprises model 760) and a thermal demagnetizer (Natsuhara Giken TDS-1).
steps.searchable_summary: perform paleomagnetic measurements using rock magnetometer and thermal demagnetizer

steps.description: The cylindrical specimens were subjected to the stepwise thermal demagnetization experiments (ThD) in air from 25 ℃ up to 600 ℃ over 24-30 steps.
The results of the experiments were processed using Paleomagnetism.org 2.0.
The characteristic remanent magnetization (ChRM) of the specimens was determined using principal component analysis (PCA).
The mean ChRM direction of each hand sample was then determined by the combined analyses of remagnetization circles.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze remagnetization circles to determine mean ChRM direction

methods.description: Identifying the nature of the main magnetic carriers contributing to the primary remanent magnetizations.

steps.description: Rock magnetic measurements were performed at the AIST Nano-Processing Facility (AIST-NPF) and GSJ-Lab. at AIST.
